Compliance Date. (Plaintiff William Henry, Tarente Randler'S Motion For Final Approval Of Class Settlement.)
Off Calendar Jan-29-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Shani Zakay, Esq. 619-255-9047 of Sakay Law for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. Hearing is held. The Court shares its views and announces it has received a declaration. Plaintiff addresses the Court's questions from the previous hearing re: discrepancies in the amount of payroll taxes that were reflected in the settlement discussion. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Compliance Date. (Plaintiff William Henry, Tarente Randler'S Motion For Final Approval Of Class Settlement.)

The Court is satisfied with the Plaintiff's report; no further status hearing is necessary.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)
